expectation.text: expectation over q, and the group o sub i from i equals 1 to G, sampled from pi old of q

group.text: one over G, sum from i equals one to G

pertoken.text: one over the length of o sub i, sum from t equals one to the length of o sub i

clip.text: clip of rho sub i t, one minus epsilon, one plus epsilon

kl.text: beta times K L divergence of pi theta from pi reference

eps-bounds.text: the interval from zero point eight to one point two

delta-logratio.text: delta equals log pi reference, minus log pi theta

k3-estimator.text: delta sub t equals log pi reference of a sub t, minus log pi theta of a sub t. K L sub t equals e to the delta sub t, minus delta sub t, minus one.

sampling-dist.text: the set of o sub i from i equals 1 to G, sampled from pi old of q

reward-formula.text: r sub i equals R of q comma o sub i

advantage-formula.text: A hat sub i equals r sub i minus the mean of r one through r G, over the standard deviation of r one through r G, plus epsilon

ratio-formula.text: rho sub i t equals pi theta of o sub i t given q and o sub i less than t, over pi old of o sub i t given q and o sub i less than t

pessimistic-min.text: minimum of rho sub i t times A hat sub i, and clip of rho sub i t, one minus epsilon, one plus epsilon, times A hat sub i

kl-penalty.text: minus beta times K L divergence of pi theta from pi reference
